title: The Unfaithfuls
writer: Ivo Perilli, Franco Brusati, Mario Monicelli
actors: Gina Lollobrigida, May Britt, Pierre Cressoy
plot: An industrialist has his wife tailed because he secretly hopes she is betraying him so that he can ask for a divorce and marry the model he's fallen in love with. This leads to a series of thefts, blackmail and a suicide as well.
